page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: KNES265 or KNES289P.

Formerly: KNES289P.

KNES282 Basic Care and Prevention of Athletic Injuries (3 Credits) Theoretical and practical foundations of the prevention, treatment and rehabilitation of athletically related injuries. Topics include: physical conditioning, preventive taping, recognition of injuries, first aid and CPR. Restriction: Must be in a major within the SPHL-Kinesiology department.
